title: Nectar Social: $30 Million Series A Raised For Agentic Marketing Operating System
summary:
Nectar Social announced it raised a $30 million Series A round led by Menlo Ventures and its Anthology Fund, which was created in partnership with Anthropic. The round also included participation from True Ventures, GV, and Kinship Ventures, the investment firm founded by Gwyneth Paltrow.
The post Nectar Social: $30 Million Series A Raised For Agentic Marketing Operating System appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Saile: $2.2 Million Raised For Healthcare Staffing And Credentialing Platform
summary:
Saile announced that it raised a $2.2 million oversubscribed pre-seed funding round led by Matchstick Ventures. Headwater Ventures also participated in the round.
The post Saile: $2.2 Million Raised For Healthcare Staffing And Credentialing Platform appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Grove: Up To $1 Billion In Daily Liquidity Launched Through Basin For Tokenized Real-World Assets
summary:
Grove announced the launch of Basin, a programmable credit infrastructure platform designed to provide eligible investors with instant stablecoin liquidity for approved exits from tokenized off-chain assets. The company said Basin will offer up to $1 billion in committed daily liquidity and launch with support from major institutional partners across asset management, tokenization infrastructure, and institutional access.
The post Grove: Up To $1 Billion In Daily Liquidity Launched Through Basin For Tokenized Real-World Assets appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Flick: $6 Million Raised For AI-Native Filmmaking Platform
summary:
Flick, an AI-native filmmaking platform founded by Zoey Zhang and Ray Wang, announced it has raised $6 million in seed funding. The round included backing from True Ventures, GV, Y Combinator, Lightspeed, Formosa Capital, Pioneer Fund, Olive Tree Capital, N1, and angel investors.
The post Flick: $6 Million Raised For AI-Native Filmmaking Platform appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Integrated Water Services: Process Filtration Acquisition Expands Industrial Wastewater Capabilities
summary:
Integrated Water Services announced the acquisition of Complete Filtration Resources, expanding its capabilities in process filtration and industrial wastewater solutions, particularly within the food and beverage sector and dairy industry.
The post Integrated Water Services: Process Filtration Acquisition Expands Industrial Wastewater Capabilities appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: LEHR: Emergency Vehicle Upfitter Acquires Enforcement One To Expand Florida Presence
summary:
LEHR, a national emergency vehicle upfitter, announced the acquisition of Enforcement One, a Florida-based emergency vehicle upfitting company serving law enforcement, emergency response, and government agencies. The deal represents LEHR’s eighth add-on acquisition and expands the company’s operational footprint across Florida and the broader Southeast region.
The post LEHR: Emergency Vehicle Upfitter Acquires Enforcement One To Expand Florida Presence appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Ascend And Honor Capital Creating Complete Insurance Financial Operations Platform Through Merger
summary:
Ascend and Honor Capital announced a definitive agreement to merge, creating what the companies describe as the insurance industry’s first fully vertically integrated financial operations platform. The combined platform will unify AI-powered accounting automation, invoicing automation, embedded payments, and native premium financing into a single solution designed for insurance businesses.
The post Ascend And Honor Capital Creating Complete Insurance Financial Operations Platform Through Merger appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Locksley Resources: High-Grade Copper And Gold Project Acquisition Expands Tottenham District Strategy
summary:
Locksley Resources announced it is acquiring a 100% interest in the Iron Duke Copper Gold Project in New South Wales, strengthening the company’s position in the Cobar District and expanding its copper and gold exploration portfolio near its existing Tottenham Project.
The post Locksley Resources: High-Grade Copper And Gold Project Acquisition Expands Tottenham District Strategy appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Siemens: Acquisition Of Key MERMEC Businesses Strengthens Global Rail Technology Portfolio
summary:
Siemens announced that its mobility division, Siemens Mobility, has signed an agreement to acquire several key businesses of MERMEC Group, an Italian high-tech company specializing in railway signaling, electrification, diagnostics, and measurement technologies.
The post Siemens: Acquisition Of Key MERMEC Businesses Strengthens Global Rail Technology Portfolio appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: LP Insurance Services: Employee Benefits Practice Acquisition Expands Southern Nevada Expertise
summary:
LP Insurance Services announced the acquisition of the Employee Benefits Consulting practice of Van Noy Consulting Group and the addition of Terry Van Noy as an Employee Benefits Consultant.
The post LP Insurance Services: Employee Benefits Practice Acquisition Expands Southern Nevada Expertise appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Bounteous Acquires Cartesian To Strengthen Data And Analytics Capabilities
summary:
Bounteous announced the acquisition of Cartesian to accelerate enterprise AI adoption by strengthening its data, analytics, and telecommunications expertise.
The post Bounteous Acquires Cartesian To Strengthen Data And Analytics Capabilities appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Iterative Health: Cardiology Site Acquisition Expands Texas Clinical Research Network
summary:
Iterative Health announced the acquisition of three cardiology research sites from NextStage Clinical Research, expanding the company’s cardiovascular clinical trial capabilities across Texas.
The post Iterative Health: Cardiology Site Acquisition Expands Texas Clinical Research Network appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: YouTube: New Creator Shows From Trevor Noah, Dude Perfect, Alex Cooper, Quen Blackwell, And More
summary:
YouTube unveiled a major slate of new and returning Creator Shows at Brandcast 2026, featuring high-profile creators, athletes, comedians, and entertainers, including Trevor Noah, Alex Cooper, Quen Blackwell, Dwyane Wade, and Dude Perfect.
The post YouTube: New Creator Shows From Trevor Noah, Dude Perfect, Alex Cooper, Quen Blackwell, And More appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: MS&AD Insurance Group Holdings Acquires 18% Stake In Barings
summary:
MassMutual and its global alternative asset management subsidiary, Barings, announced that MS&AD Insurance Group Holdings has completed the acquisition of an 18% equity stake in Barings through its subsidiary, Mitsui Sumitomo Insurance Co., Ltd. (MSI), a major Japanese insurance company.
The post MS&AD Insurance Group Holdings Acquires 18% Stake In Barings appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Iridium: $366.7 Million Aireon Acquisition Advances Aviation Safety Strategy
summary:
Iridium Communications announced it has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Aireon, operator of the world’s only space-based Automatic Dependent Surveillance-Broadcast (ADS-B) air traffic surveillance system. The transaction is designed to strengthen Iridium’s position in aviation safety by combining space-based surveillance, satellite communications, positioning, navigation, and timing (PNT) services, and aviation operational data on a single global network.
The post Iridium: $366.7 Million Aireon Acquisition Advances Aviation Safety Strategy appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Signant Health: Acquisition Of Ametris Creates End-To-End eCOA And Digital Outcome Measures Platform
summary:
Signant Health announced the acquisition of Ametris in a move designed to combine electronic clinical outcome assessment (eCOA) solutions with wearable-derived digital outcome measures for clinical trials.
The post Signant Health: Acquisition Of Ametris Creates End-To-End eCOA And Digital Outcome Measures Platform appeared first on Pulse 2.0.
